title: APPENDIX 10. — Additional ITS sequences used for Appendix 9 in The Amidella clade in Europe (Basidiomycota: Amanitaceae): clarification of the contentious Amanita valens (E.-J.Gilbert) Bertault and the importance of taxon-specific PCR primers for identification
